name: asisten
description: Alfa — asisten belajar bertenaga Claude (wave v1.6 #35). Action chat:ask (login wajib, konteks materi member-gated + published-only, bounded 20 pesan/4000 char/8000 char konteks/1024 max_tokens, model Haiku). Tanpa kuota per-user (keputusan owner; kill-switch = unset ANTHROPIC_API_KEY). UI AsistenChatView + hook useAsistenChat yang kompatibel seam appshell capabilities.useChat.
notes: 0.1.0 (2026-07-16, alpha): STATUS row #35 (wave v1.6) — OS-7 jadi nyata. NOL tabel baru (riwayat chat hidup di state window; nol biaya simpan). Action default V8 runtime (fetch tanpa 'use node') supaya teruji convex-test dengan fetch stub (pola announcements/discord.test.ts). Auth = getAuthUserId langsung di action (requireUser _shared bertipe Query/MutationCtx); konteks lesson via internal query lessonContext (normalizeId → NOT_FOUND seragam; membership by_tenant_user; course harus published — draft tak bocor, P0 §6). Provider errors dipetakan ke kode kontrak (429/529 → RATE_LIMITED, lainnya → NOT_FOUND generic) tanpa meneruskan body provider. Kunci API tak pernah ke wire — di-assert di test. Keputusan owner 2026-07-16: tanpa kuota per-user dulu; guard biaya = bound per request + Haiku + kill-switch env; kuota harian tinggal menambah cek + RATE_LIMITED bila dibutuhkan.
